Rajni Flour Mills

ਰਾਜਨੀ ਫਲੋਰ ਮਿਲਜ਼ • ERP System

00:00:00

Welcome to Rajni Flour Mills ERP

Please select a section to manage mill operations

📝

New Entry

ਨਵੀਂ ਐਂਟਰੀ

Log new grinding materials entering the mill and set expected delivery date.

0 ⚙️

Under Process

ਪ੍ਰੋਸੈਸ ਅਧੀਨ

View and manage orders sorted by material categories currently in process.

0 ✅

Completed Orders

ਪੂਰੇ ਹੋਏ ਆਰਡਰ

Manage completed orders awaiting payment collection and final dispatch.

📊

Reports & Income

ਰਿਪੋਰਟਾਂ ਅਤੇ ਕਮਾਈ

Check processed material statistics, total earnings, and filter logs by month or date range.

💾

Data Sync

ਡਾਟਾ ਬੈਕਅਪ

Manage manual database sync, backup download, restoration, and troubleshooting.

New Grinding Entry / ਨਵੀਂ ਐਂਟਰੀ

Under Process Orders / ਪ੍ਰੋਸੈਸ ਅਧੀਨ

Details

Completed (Payment Pending) / ਪੂਰੇ ਹੋਏ ਆਰਡਰ

Orders Pending Grinding (ਪ੍ਰੋਸੈਸ ਅਧੀਨ)
0
Awaiting Payment (ਪੇਮੈਂਟ ਬਾਕੀ)
0
Total Earnings (ਕੁੱਲ ਕਮਾਈ)
₹0.00
Total Ground Material (ਕੁੱਲ ਵਜ਼ਨ)
0.00 kg

Operations Reports / ਰਿਪੋਰਟਾਂ

Material Summary / ਸਮੱਗਰੀ ਅਨੁਸਾਰ ਵੇਰਵਾ

Material (ਸਮੱਗਰੀ) Total Processed Weight (ਕੁੱਲ ਵਜ਼ਨ) Orders Count (ਕੁੱਲ ਆਰਡਰ) Total Income (ਕੁੱਲ ਕਮਾਈ)

Detailed Orders Log / ਵਿਸਤ੍ਰਿਤ ਆਰਡਰ ਇਤਿਹਾਸ

Queue# Date & Time Customer Material In Weight Out Weight Income Method Status

Data Backup & Sync / ਡਾਟਾ ਬੈਕਅਪ

Firebase Firestore Sync

Sync local mill data with the online cloud database to ensure records are safe. Changes are uploaded in the background. If you are offline, updates are queued and will sync when connection is restored.

Local JSON Backups

Download a complete offline copy of your flour mill logs. You can use this file to restore database records anytime.

Danger Zone

Permanently clear the local database cache. All records stored on this device will be deleted. Make sure you have exported a backup JSON file before proceeding!

Enter Final Weight

Customer:

Material:

Initial Weight: kg

Note: Final weight is usually slightly less than initial weight due to chaff/dust extraction.

Collect Payment & Out

Customer:

Material:

Initial Weight: kg

Final Ground Weight: kg
